prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A horizontal timeline with three test cycles. Each cycle has the same pattern: a "beforeEach" station (shown as a janitor with a broom wiping a whiteboard clean and setting up fresh supplies), followed by a test execution block (a scientist performing an experiment), followed by an "afterEach" station (the janitor cleaning up again). Between each cycle, a wall or divider prevents any contamination. Each test gets pristine, identical starting conditions. A crossed-out arrow tries to pass state between tests but is blocked. Labels emphasize "fresh state" and "no shared mutations". The isolation between tests is visually clear.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
